v0.3.1.description:
# Five Nights at Fuckboy's 2 First Release.
* All changes to the base game can be found in the [README](https://github.com/zuils/FNaFBAP?tab=readme-ov-file#changes-to-base-game-of-fnafb2)
* Obviously this is not allowed in any of the official servers.
* View the [setup](https://github.com/zuils/FNaFBAP?tab=readme-ov-file#changes-to-base-game-of-fnafb2) to see how to run the game
v0.3.1.title: Five Nights at Fuckboy's AP v0.3.1

v0.3.4.description:
* Fixed some logic bugs with withered foxy
* Fixed beta voucher dropping real mic
* Backup Bash buffed to 16% chance to hit
* Toreador March no longer moves last
* Fixed Vending Machine not sending check out
* Fixed Toy Bonnie softlocking your game in the right vent
* Fixed gen issues
* Foxy in the Refurbs fight now always paralyzes when using plank walk
* Probably some other stuff I missed

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zuils/FNaFBAP/compare/v0.3.3...v0.3.4
v0.3.4.title: FNaFB2AP v0.3.4

v0.3.5.description:
* Fixed BB Softlocking your game (now the shops work like the way it does in FNaFB1AP)
* Fixed Party Room 3 BB crash
* Fixed Toy Chica not going back into party when you beat splash woman
* Fixed BB disappearing when you beat all cameras
* Copyright option is default on no (vanilla thing)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zuils/FNaFBAP/compare/v0.3.2...v0.3.5
v0.3.5.title: FNaFB2AP v0.3.5

v0.4.0.description:
* Fixed a bunch of bugs (There might still be more that I haven't seen)
* Added B.B. Scenario
* New yaml options, also removed all the questions the game asks you before you start your save
* Added a B.B. in the top left corner of show stage to allow you to change ports (you will no longer receive items, so I left the debug room open. Don't know why that happens)
* Only bug that I do know of is B.B. in the B.B. Scenario receiving some abilities on level up despite me removing all of them from his class.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zuils/FNaFBAP/compare/v0.3.5...v0.4.0
v0.4.0.title: FNaFB2AP v0.4.0

v0.4.1.description: * Added manifest file and fixed gen issues.
v0.4.1.title: FNaFB2AP v0.4.1
